[textmode.synth.js](../index.md) / SynthPlugin

# Variable: SynthPlugin

```ts
const SynthPlugin: TextmodePlugin;
```

The `textmode.synth.js` plugin to install.

Install this plugin to enable `.synth()` on TextmodeLayer instances.
